programme.title: Queendom

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House Of Payne
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Payne-Ting'. Calvin, CJ, and Malik think Ella is cheating on Curtis when they stumble upon her secret love diary.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House Of Payne
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 - A Payne-ful Interview'. When Curtis freezes up during an interview for a popular online show, Ella comes to the rescue causing the show to become more interested in her.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: 'S9/E20 - Black Ink Milwaukee'. With Ceaser and the bosses in Milwaukee for Ted's grand opening, the Brooklyn crew plays hooky with an unexpected guest.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Magic Xylophone'. As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hospital'. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Mission: Big Bear'. Sylvie visits a school to help ease first day school nerves. Sylvie helps the children find their classroom and when the time comes for play, Sylvie goes first to demonstrate how much fun it is.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Andy and the Spotted Hyenas'. Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer, embarking on a global adventure to Kenya in search of spotted hyenas. They discover how hyenas use a secret body language to communicate.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - Camping'. While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E48'. The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Sandy's Waistcoat of Wonders'. Sandy claims he can pull absolutely anything from of his waistcoat of wonders, so Captain Captain and Seaweed put him to the test. But Sandy decides there's only one way to properly convince them!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E73 - Escape'. When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E74 - Bus'. During a game of bus, passenger Mum is too shy to tell bus driver Dad that she secretly loves him, until she gets some help from the Grannies.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E66 - Queens'. During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - The First Big Camping Adventure'. The friends are excited to go on a camping trip, but Zip is nervous about being in a dark place away from home. He must try to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Ship Shape Shipmates'. Captain Sinker threatens to fire Cook and Line, so they pretend to be new pirates for her crew. Meanwhile, adventurers Adam, Jorja, Emily and Thomas take on Coconutty Raft.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S6/E11 - Line's Pirate Choir'. Line decides to start his very own pirate choir with the help of Cook and Captain HeyHo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E88 - Postman'. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum to make up. Bluey must find a way to play Ground's Lava with Bingo and deliver the letter to Mum, without squabbling.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E62 - More About High and Low'. The Twirlywoos watch people using an elevator. The Twirlywoos have fun making the elevator go high and low. Back inside The Big Red Boat it's time for Fruit Tea.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Noisy'. The Twirlywoos discover playing with a radio can have noisy consequences, and the stop-go car comes to visit.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Running Race'. The Teletubbies do running races and they each have a chance to win. When the Tubby Phone rings, there's a race to reach it before the tubby phone dance.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E58 - Bingo'. When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E62 - Rug Island'. On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E57 - Charades'. Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E14'. Someone has spread glue all over the platform at Toy Green station. Noddy investigates, while Cloppycorn tries to do a trick in front of the stuck toys.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - It's time for carnival'. JoJo wants to celebrate the St Lucia carnival with Great Gran Gran, but it's too far away to travel to! Instead, JoJo and Gran Gran have their own carnival in the garden!

programme.title: The World According To Grandpa
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Series 1, Episode 7'. Connie asks what happened to the dinosaurs?

programme.title: Roots and Fruits

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Devon and Cornwall'. A scenic journey to the tip of Cornwall. Starting in Devon, this trip crosses the Royal Albert Bridge, heading towards Penzance before joining two picturesque branch lines.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Tut's Last Mission'. The stunning discovery of an executed man in Northern Italy reveals the brutal truth behind the Roman practice of crucifixion and sheds new light on the most famous crucifixion of all.

programme.title: Universe
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Milky Way: Island of Light'. Professor Brian Cox journeys across the vastness of time and space.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E5 - Shetlands'. Ben journeys to one of Britain's furthest outposts - the Shetland Islands to meet Helen and Jason, a couple on the edge of the weather-beaten island of Yell.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E10 - Snared'. Lessons are learned and personal battles are fought by Alaskans enduring winter's descent. Chip and Agnes hailstone dig their boat out of the ice and Ricko Dewilde takes his two daughters on a hunt.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Beasts of the Bayou'. When engineers built railroads across the swamps of New Orleans, cutting-edge technology and new methods had to be used. We see how they did it, and the extreme trains that are now used to cross it.

programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - French Polynesia'. Ben builds hammocks, goes freediving and experiences rough seas when he meets British expat Rick and his girlfriend Jasna, who live a nomadic life on their yacht in the islands of French Polynesia.

programme.desc: 'The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan. S3/E3 - Romania'. Romesh heads off to Romania. With the help of activist and media expert Angi Serban, he explores the many amazing things that are overlooked in this vast slice of Europe.

programme.title: Fishing Leopards
programme.desc: The story of a leopard mother and her two cubs, who must survive in the wilds of Botswana alongside lions, wild dogs and hyenas.

programme.desc: 'S42/E8 - Chopped U.'. Four college students with a passion for cooking take over the kitchen to see who can make the culinary grade in three ambitious challenges.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Captain Cook And The Hawaiians'. Andrew Zimmern travels across the globe to try the world's most exotic foods. He visits markets and restaurants to sample incredible and whacky cuisines.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S16/E3 - Dumplings In Delaware'. Chef Robert Irvine is in Delaware to help a restaurant that is on the verge of being closed down. Robert must motivate an owner who is deep in debt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S33/E4 - Takeout: All Kinds Of Flavor'. Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four chefs via video chat. He makes American Indian fare from Denver and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E2 - More Cheese, Please!'. The chefs find cheese in every basket and have to make it the star of every plate. A wild comfort food hybrid proves challenging in round two.

programme.title: Tournament Of Champions
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Randomizer Gone Wild'. In a new round of culinary conflicts, the chefs face off against the upgraded randomizer with an all-new wild card category. Things are about to get wild!

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S27/E10 - Classics Worth Cooking'. The hosts break down the classic dishes that every home cook can master. They include whole roasted chicken, salad niçoise and a T-bone steak.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S41/E1 - Game On!'. Four chefs cook a game-day feast using a whimsical dish that looks like nachos - in the first round. And, a fusion snack meets a hybrid beverage in the dessert basket.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Titans Vs Mei Lin'. Chef Mei Lin brings her competitive edge to Bobby's kitchen. As Michael Voltaggio's former protege, she's ready to show that the student can outcook the master.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Titans Vs Byron Gomez'. Costa Rican chef Byron Gomez hopes his trailblazing flavours and Michelin training will help him take the bag of $25,000 from Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Titans Vs Scott Conant'. Chef Scott Conant enters Bobby Flay's kitchen to prove he still has what it takes to compete with the best. Scott enjoys showing off his skills to the Titans.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - William Wallace's Scotland'. Andrew Zimmern travels across the globe to try the world's most exotic foods. He visits markets and restaurants to sample incredible and whacky cuisines.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E7 - International Infusion'. Guy Fieri is looking for food with international flavours. An eatery in Delaware is putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E8 - Beef Bonanza'. Guy Fieri is on the road looking for unique beef dishes. He finds meaty ravioli in Delaware, meatloaf in San Diego, and a tasty Middle-Eastern fare in Texas.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E4 - Mouth Of The South'. Four chefs from the South aim to up their games against talented peers. First up, the appetiser basket includes a questionable take on fried chicken.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S57/E9 - Truffle Kerfuffle'. It's a kerfuffle in the kitchen as four chefs work with prized fungi in every round. A pricey cut of meat in the entrée basket puts pressure on the chefs.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - It's Nonna Time!'. The 11 remaining chefs learn from authentic Italian nonnas how to make pasta shapes from scratch before taking on a three-dish pasta challenge.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S16/E4 - Out With Old, In With New'. In Port Jervis, New York, Robert helps a restaurant with an identity crisis. The owner needs a change or this small-town gem will have to close.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S33/E5 - South Dakota Smorgasbord'. Guy is in South Dakota to visit the state's first Ethiopian joint, And, he checks out the unique comfort food at a Midwest-Southern restaurant.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E3 - Buzzworthy Bizarre Baskets'. The basketeers outdid themselves for this special competition, featuring mandatory ingredients that leave the chefs shaking their heads in disbelief.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - International Intrigue'. The remaining six bakers are challenged to create delicious desserts that look like an international dish. Which young baker will fail to impress?

programme.title: Baker's Dozen
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Earth To Dessert'. The bakers decorate beautiful miniature wedding cakes. The finalists must wow guest judge Loria Stern with an amazing dessert inspired by nature.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E8 - Good Ole Creole Cookin''. Four chefs who specialise in comforting and complex Creole cuisine get creative with their basket ingredients, which include alligator meat.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: 'S16/E4 - Marrow Minded'. Bone marrow isn't just for fancy gastropubs. Host Alton Brown delivers everything you need to know to enjoy this indulgent ingredient at home.

programme.title: Tournament Of Champions
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Win Or Go Home'. Guy Fieri introduces eight new chefs in a new round of sudden death battles. They fight to conquer the randomizer, wow the judges and move onto the Super 16.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E17 - From Chicken To Cheesesteak'. Guy Fieri digs into chicken and some crazy creations. In Palm Springs, a crepe spot is all about the savoury, while a funky joint cooks Mexican pollo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S36/E1 - Burger, Bird And Meaty Italian'. Guy Fieri dives into a meaty smorgasbord! There's a skyscraper burger in Nashville and in Florida, a rockin' chef cooks up real deal gnocchi.

programme.title: Big Bad Budget Battle
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Weekend On A Budget'. Ree Drummond challenges the competitors to make weekend meals with a $50 budget. After making a grilled summer sandwich, they prep for unexpected guests.

programme.desc: 'S17/E7 - Colorado Couple In Crisis'. Robert works with Colorado restaurant owners who are in debt and on the brink of divorce. They must work together to save their restaurant and relationship.

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tried-and-true Appetizers'. Joanna whips up all of her favourite appetisers. The menu includes cheese balls, baked brie, spinach artichoke dip and homemade pretzels with cheese dip.

programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Richard's teamwork overtime to complete their first big restoration - a 1950s Alvis. Plus, they are under pressure to get their racing MGB fit for competition.

programme.title: ALL THINGS MOTORING INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: 'S7/E12'. Mike interviews Michael Rogers, an exceptionally talented motorsport artist. And Ernest does our last retro review for the season. This is a show filled with nostalgia.

programme.title: The Bike Show
programme.desc: 'S24/E31'. The BMW F 900 GS off-road in Mpumalanga, the monstrous KTM 1290 Super Adventure S, and an 8-cylinder Chinese touring bike. That's all this week, on The Bike Show.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - 2/13'. Steve Grahame runs into trouble in the mud, dealing with a broken body and high-voltage headaches, Cameron faces rising temperatures on the long road west.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: 'S24/E31'. An iconic German car that's remained true to itself for 50 years, spectacularly, spectacular. The Golf appeals to the young and old generation, but what's so special about it.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: 'S24/E31'. BMW lifts the covers on a concept car, we've got the thrills of an off-road racer in practical pick-up attire. Porsche gives it 911 car a hybrid power for the first time.

programme.title: Extreme Festival
programme.desc: 'S24/E4'. The Eastern Cape crowds were treated to top class racing by the Astron Energy Polo Cup and VW Rookies Cup. Also on track were Investchem F1600 and SA Touring Cars/Supacup.

programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - You're Too Little'. Harry discovers that he is too small to pick apples so he goes to the Dino World Mooseum to find some growth-enhancing milk from a cow.

programme.title: Gee My Krag
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 13'. Ross en Kath van Numbi Valley lewe in absolute harmonie met die natuur. Met kaal hande het hul 'n pragtige huis uit 'n damwal gebou en omtrent al hul kos kom uit hul permakultuur-tuin.

programme.title: Vat Jou Goed En Trek
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 of 13'. Die span besoek Ilse in Moreleta Park, Pretoria, waar hulle haar help om haar leefarea en eetkamer beter te benut en optimaal te laat vertoon.

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 of 26'. Poena het dringend mediese hulp nodig vir sy vreeslike ongemaklike pyn. Coco hoor toevallig waar Poen is. Shakira gee Poenie raad oor hoe hy sy agterdog oor Chanel moet hanteer.

programme.title: Projek Dina
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 of 10'. Lux en Charlie begin wonder of Magdalena deel is van die sindikaat. Wanneer 'n vermiste jong dame se broer na haar begin soek, stort die nuwe lewe wat sy vir haarself gebou het, in duie.

programme.title: Moederhart
programme.desc: 'S1/E120 of 160'. Kemal daag net betyds by Nefise se huis op, maar Tugba het steeds nie tou opgegooi nie. Onur weet dat hy polisie toe moet gaan.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E88 of 153'. Texas vertel vir Justin en Gary die casino is iets van die verlede, terwyl Aiden 'n spesiale aand vir Lisa reël. Mymoena jok vir Rhafiek.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 of 72'. Hazel raak agterdogtig wanneer Christine vra oor die plaas se besigheid. JP is ingenome as hy sien Amber raak meer betrokke by die plaas. Ruan vra Patty uiteindelik uit, maar gaan sy ja sê?

programme.title: Klaskamer 10
programme.desc: 'S8/E65 of 99'. Werner behandel graad 12 fisiese wetenskappe konsepte.

programme.title: Slank

programme.title: Taktiek
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 13'. Lisa oorweeg om te rebound met Goose, terwyl Attie en Willy Brown veg om 'n senior dame se hand. Karen soek meer besigheid en moeilikheid vir Taktiek.

programme.title: Fiks Of Niks
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 of 13'. Ellenie begin haar transformasie terwyl Henck en Lizahn vir die eerste keer saam oefen. Ellenie ontvang opwindende nuus en Lizahn en haar man bespreek die dokter se uitslae.

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A gold-digging teacher (Cameron Diaz) is dumped by her fiancé when he sees through her. She soon falls for a colleague (Justin Timberlake) but faces some stiff competition.

programme.title: The Whale
programme.desc: Brendan Fraser's performance in this moving psychological drama earned him an Oscar. A reclusive, morbidly obese English teacher tries to restore his relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Shooting Stars
programme.desc: An inspiring book-inspired film about the early years of basketball star LeBron James.

programme.title: Redeemed
programme.desc: After becoming the youngest female minority judge elevated to the bench in her state, Angela Sylvester quickly finds herself trapped in a prison scam orchestrated by her boss.

programme.title: Little Loopers
programme.desc: A golfer with an attitude meets his match with a group of teens in this family sports movie. A former golfer sentenced to community service must teach teenagers to play.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Oscar winner Diane Keaton is charming in this delightful comedy. A 30-year-old woman's wish to be 70 comes true while in Palm Springs for her best friend's bachelorette party.

programme.title: Ella Bella Bingo
programme.desc: This great animation shows the complications of friendship. Ella Bella Bingo and Henry are best friends, but everything changes when a new boy moves into the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Michael J. Fox returns to voice everyone's favourite talking mouse, who heads off on an adventure in this sequel when he races across the city to save a new friend.

programme.title: Riki Rhino: The Bird Kingdom
programme.desc: A fun, family adventure. Riki, a brave rhino, and his duck friend Beni journey through a tropical jungle to find a magic seed that will help save their home from a foreseen tsunami.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: Based on the children's stories, this adventure follows a teenager who teams up with horror author, RL Stine, to save his town from monsters that are set free from the books.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Steve Carell lends his voice talents to this epic animation. A criminal mastermind uses a trio of orphan girls for a grand plan, but he soon finds that they are changing him.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: Anna Faris stars in this crazy, zany comedy. A Playboy bunny is kicked out of the Playboy Mansion. She must now find a job and a new life.

programme.title: Shotgun Wedding
programme.desc: When criminals hijack a lavish destination wedding, Jennifer Lopez and Josh Duhamel's fight for their lives, families, and relationship in this action comedy.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore and Lucy Liu revive the legendary trio of agents in romping, girl-power style. This time, they must retrieve stolen voice-ID software.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: A night of comedy ensues in this chaotic movie. A harmless dinner takes an unexpected turn for four frazzled moms.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: An incredible true story in which Oscar-nominated Jesse Eisenberg plays Marcel Marceau, the world-famous mime who helped get Jewish orphans to safety during World War 2.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: In this action thriller, Jet Li and Jason Statham are trading blows. An FBI agent resorts to revenge after a notorious assassin kills his partner and his family. [p,l.

programme.title: Zeros And Ones
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke takes on a dual role in this gripping war thriller. An American soldier stationed in Rome must stop an imminent terrorist threat to the Vatican.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: Bruce Willis fights for his family in this action film. The work of a billionaire tech CEO is so valuable that he hires mercenaries to protect it, but terrorists kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Maid Marian
programme.desc: Everyone knows Robin Hood, but this film follows Maid Marian. With news of King Richard's death and Robin returning, Marian leaves her sanctuary, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Malicious Mind Games
programme.desc: A widowed mother takes a job as an overnight security guard. During her shift, she witnesses a murder, only to later discover the victim is alive and well.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Based on the TV drama, Samuel L Jackson, Colin Farrell, and Michelle Rodriguez must deal with a deadly situation as a SWAT team must stop a locked-up crime boss from escaping.

programme.title: Men In Black
programme.desc: An action-packed sci-fi comedy that has become a modern-day classic. Special agent J (Will Smith) discovers that a secret agency is monitoring all extraterrestrial activity on earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Michael Bay and Shia LaBeouf bring the 80s cartoon hit to life in this action epic. A teenage boy is caught in the middle of an eternal struggle between two alien robot races.

programme.title: Assassin Club
programme.desc: Henry Golding and Noomi Rapace drive this action thriller. An assassin is given a contract to kill seven people around the world, only to discover the targets are also assassins.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: George Clooney leads an all-star cast in this brilliant (and funny) heist drama about a charming conman determined to rob Las Vegas with the help of a few criminal elements.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the ancient anti-hero in this superhero movie. 5 000 years after being given the powers of the gods, Black Adam is freed, unleashing his unique form of justice.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Gerard Butler fights against the odds in this war movie. A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.title: Confess, Fletch
programme.desc: Jon Hamm drives this crime comedy. After becoming the prime suspect in multiple murders, Fletch strives to prove his innocence as he looks for his fiancée's stolen art collection.

programme.desc: An 18-year-old youth leader is expected to handle an unexpected pregnancy with a fellow church member. The scandal begins to create a number of complications for the teenagers.

programme.title: Kgaratlho
programme.desc: After losing her job, a young mother is seduced into a relationship with a man who promises to take care of her every need. But at what cost?

programme.title: Isikhundla
programme.desc: Two ambitious lawyers from different backgrounds battle it out for a promotion. One to help finance her mother's operation, the other to win his father's approval.

programme.title: Beng'shadelani

programme.title: Ziyawa Kagogo
programme.desc: Two brothers are on the brink of homelessness and secretly plan an epic house party to raise funds and save their family home.

programme.title: Inhlanhla

programme.title: Mina Nabangani Bam
programme.desc: A girls' weekend away turns into a deadly hostage drama. No one is safe.

programme.title: Imoto Yokufa

programme.title: Table Manners

programme.title: Diamond In The Rough

programme.title: Rush For Your Life
